mechanism_narrative: A falling federal funds rate transmits into lower discount rates and easier financial conditions, lifting equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is strongest when inflation is not accelerating, because easing is then interpreted as genuine stimulus rather than a policy response to stress.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in periods when FEDFUNDS declines while CPIAUCSL inflation is stable or falling, or if the sign becomes negative in more than half of easing episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in housing starts indicates improving household demand, credit formation, and construction activity, which tends to support cyclical earnings and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect should be visible when housing activity is accelerating from a prior trough.
candidate_trigger: HOUST rises above its 3-month moving average after a prior 3-month decline
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST recoveries are followed by negative 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average forward return is indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals weakening labor income and consumer demand, which compresses revenue expectations and raises recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect is strongest when unemployment accelerates rather than merely stays elevated.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points over 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if SPX delivers positive 20-day returns in a majority of UNRATE-acceleration episodes, or if the signal has no edge relative to unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: A joint improvement in payroll growth and retail sales reflects expanding nominal demand and household spending power, which should lift near-term corporate revenue expectations and support S&P 500 returns. The mechanism is not decomposable into either series alone because both income and spending must strengthen together.
failure_condition: Reject if simultaneous month-over-month gains in PAYEMS and RSAFS do not correspond to positive 20-day SPX returns more often than not, or if either series alone explains the effect equally well.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals stronger real activity and better capacity utilization, which improves manufacturing profits and cyclicals, creating a positive equity impulse over the next quarter. The signal should be more reliable when production growth is broad-based rather than a one-month spike.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum is followed by negative or flat 60-day SPX returns across repeated samples, or if the effect disappears after controlling for recent market trend.

mechanism_narrative: A low unemployment rate only supports equities when it reflects a healthy full-employment expansion rather than an overheating economy; under that condition, labor income is strong and default risk stays contained, favoring positive S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal fails when low unemployment coincides with rising inflation pressure.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE stays below 5.5% and CPIAUCSL monthly inflation is not accelerating
failure_condition: Reject if low-UNRATE, non-accelerating-inflation periods do not outperform baseline SPX returns, or if the sign turns negative when CPIAUCSL accelerates.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden policy-rate increase tightens financing conditions and reduces equity valuation multiples, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next week. The effect should be strongest when the market has not already priced the hike and when the move exceeds recent policy drift.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25 percentage points over 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if rate-hike episodes are not followed by negative 5-day SPX returns more often than not, or if average returns after hikes are positive.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales and housing starts both rise together, the combination signals synchronized consumer spending and real-economy demand, which should lift equities over the next quarter. If housing rises without sales, the signal is weaker; both must confirm the expansion to validate the mechanism.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both increase on a 3-month basis
failure_condition: Reject if joint RSAFS-HOUST expansion does not lead to positive 60-day SPX returns in a clear majority of instances, or if the joint signal has no incremental value over either proxy alone.
